brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: Highlighting the ultra-stretch, squat-proof reliability of Arrowow Active's Seamless Sage Green Leggings under intense gym lighting, combined with raw, high-energy tough-love motivation that challenges viewers to stop making excuses and elevate their training.
strategy.cta: Stop wasting workouts in cheap gear. Upgrade to the ultimate squat-proof comfort at the Arrowow Active store.
strategy.hook: Think beautiful sage green leggings are always see-through? Watch this squat. If you want results, stop making excuses and put in the work!

script.script_text: Think beautiful sage green leggings are ALWAYS see-through? ... Watch this squat! ... If you want RESULTS ... stop making EXCUSES and put in the WORK! ... Alright team, ... Quick reality check: ... Stop wasting your energy on gear that can't handle your GRIND. ... Look at this stretch under these intense gym lights ... absolutely ZERO sheerness! ... These Seamless Sage Green Leggings from Arrowow Active are engineered for UNMATCHED reliability and buttery-soft comfort ... so you can focus ONE HUNDRED PERCENT on your training ... NOT your gear. ... Stop wasting workouts in CHEAP gear! ... Upgrade to the ULTIMATE squat-proof comfort at the Arrowow Active store ... and let's get after it today!

text_critic_report.feedback: The script avoids all prohibited phrases ('Hello everyone', 'Welcome back to my channel', 'Buy this product now', 'Link in bio') and perfectly captures the high-energy, encouraging, tough-love tone representing Sienna Bondi, using her key catchphrases ('Alright team,', 'Quick reality check:', 'let\'s get after it today,') naturally.

scenes.action: A confident fitness influencer wearing beautiful sage green leggings stands in a bright, modern gym. She speaks directly to the camera with high energy and passion, delivering the entire script. During the mention of squats, she performs a deep squat to demonstrate the fabric, and pulls slightly at the hip to show its stretch and complete opacity under the intense gym lights, maintaining perfect lip-sync throughout the continuous presentation.
scenes.camera: A static, eye-level medium-full shot capturing the presenter from head to toe, maintaining a fixed frame to allow her to perform the squat and gestures naturally while keeping her centered.

wardrobe_location.location: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.static_frame_prompt: A highly detailed, single continuous eye-level talking-head shot of Sienna, a confident fitness influencer with high energy, looking directly at the camera and actively speaking with natural facial expressions and her mouth moving to deliver her sharp lines. Sienna is standing in a brightly lit, modern gym decorated with mirrors reflecting clean equipment and free weights in the background. She is wearing a stylish, form-fitting sage green matching seamless activewear set, showcasing the premium stretch and complete fabric opacity. She gestures naturally with her hands within the frame, looking enthusiastic and passionate. The camera remains completely static, keeping Sienna centered from the chest up under bright, professional, and intense gym lighting. There are absolutely no cuts, transitions, second levels, or changes in camera angle, maintaining a single continuous take optimized for lip-sync.

static_frame.prompt: A highly detailed, single continuous eye-level talking-head shot of Sienna, a confident fitness influencer with high energy, looking directly at the camera and actively speaking with natural facial expressions and her mouth moving to deliver her sharp lines. Sienna is standing in a brightly lit, modern gym decorated with mirrors reflecting clean equipment and free weights in the background. She is wearing a stylish, form-fitting sage green matching seamless activewear set, showcasing the premium stretch and complete fabric opacity. She gestures naturally with her hands within the frame, looking enthusiastic and passionate. The camera remains completely static, keeping Sienna centered from the chest up under bright, professional, and intense gym lighting. There are absolutely no cuts, transitions, second levels, or changes in camera angle, maintaining a single continuous take optimized for lip-sync.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: The video has a complete lack of lip sync. The audio and the speaker's mouth movements are entirely misaligned, making it very obvious that it is AI-generated and creating a strong uncanny valley effect. While the visual generation of the person and the background is decent, the failure to synchronize the audio with the facial animations makes the video unusable for production.
